allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Backend OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Backend loads OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('All routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes][:20]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\([r.path for r in app.routes if 'extension' in r.path or 'group' in r.path or 'connect' in r.path]\)")
